name: Umang Bhatt
title: Affiliated Assistant Professor of Machine Learning
email: ?subject=Umang Bhatt&body=%0A%0AUmang Bhatt%0AAffiliated Assistant Professor of Machine Learning%0Ahttps%3A%2F%2Fmbzuai.ac.ae%2Fstudy%2Ffaculty%2Fumang-bhatt%2F

tabs.biography: Prior to joining MBZUAI, Professor Bhatt served as an Assistant Professor at the University of Cambridge, where he was affiliated with the Institute for Technology and Humanity (ITH) and its Centre for Human-Inspired Artificial Intelligence (CHIA). In this role, he contributed to advancing research at the intersection of artificial intelligence, human-centered design, and societal impact, with a particular focus on developing technologies that are both ethically grounded and practically applicable. Professor Bhatt's work at Cambridge spanned interdisciplinary collaborations, integrating insights from computer science, engineering, philosophy, and the social sciences to address emerging challenges in the responsible development and deployment of AI.
tabs.education: Ph.D. in Engineering, The University of Cambridge, England M.Sc. in Electrical and Computer Engineering, Carnegie Mellon University, USA B.Sc. in Electrical and Computer Engineering, Carnegie Mellon University, USA
tabs.accolades: Center for Democracy & Technology Fellowship: 2024 – 2026 New York University Center for Data Science Faculty Fellowship: 2023-2025 The Alan Turing Institute Enrichment Studentship: 2021 – 2022 Mozilla Fellowship: 2020 – 2021 Partnership on AI Research Fellowship: 2019 – 2020 Leverhulme Center for the Future of Intelligence PhD Scholarship: 2019 – 2023
